DashSynt
FeaturesPricingTemplatesDocs

Minimal by design.
Powerful under the hood.

A 3-page SaaS template for teams that hate clutter.

01
Clean components
No gloss, no glass. Just the geometry teams build with.
02
System-first
Typography, spacing, colour — locked to a grid that scales.
03
Ship fast
Three pages, every breakpoint. Deploy Monday, iterate all week.
Features

Built for teams that ship.

A11y
WCAG 2.1 AA across all pages.
Animations
60fps, reduced-motion aware.
SEO
OpenGraph, JSON-LD, sitemap.
Analytics
Umami/Plausible-ready.
Components
40+ reusable sections.
Visual Breakpoints
Desktop, tablet, mobile.
